title: Jinbe Begins the Story
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Narrator, Fukaboshi, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Robin. The core story beat is jinbe begins the story.
scene: The scene centers on jinbe begins the story, with Unknown person #1, King Neptune, Narrator, Fukaboshi, Fish-Men, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Robin driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, what a cats- Strophie...!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: to think that we have abandoned the king alone in his own palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is no time for whining! We did as his majesty ordered!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, we need a means of Communini- caution!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: We must get in contact with the princes without delay...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and return to the Palace with a fighting force!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The nearest town is Gyoualley Hills!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You will do as I say!!! Muhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaAR SHIH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: Stop - Stop, everyone!! Now - you are from the fishman district, are you not?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why are you doing this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhh!!! be quiet!!! This country belongs to Captain Hardy NOW!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So shut up and get trampling!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop, Please!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shut up and do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't! I could never trample on this face...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: anything but that...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Anyone who refuses to trample on the face is a friend of humans!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: kyakkyah!!! That makes you our enemy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's not hard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Either you trample on the face,

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Or you leave the island...!! So hurry it up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you don't like either choice, I'm allowed to slice you up instead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No way...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're telling us to leave the country?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's nowhere else on the sea floor where the sun shines...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: And you can't expect us to live amongst the humans...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: You see...? That just proves you understand that humans are British and vile!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Humans and Fishmen can never truly live in harmony!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: So Bow down to your new King Hardy!! The man who will conquer the humans and change the course of history!!!

summary: Jinbe Begins the Story. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
